value:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out, and I appreciate you sharing those details with us.

I understand your frustration—if the promotion is already added to your account per the error message, you should definitely be seeing those discounts reflected when you book. That's not the experience we want you to have.

To help us investigate this properly, could you please share:
- Your account number or the email associated with your account
- The error message screenshot you mentioned (First attachment)
- The screenshot showing the missing discounts when booking with your HDFC card (Second attachment)

Regarding other ways to reach support: you can reply directly to this email, and our team will be able to assist you. We're here to help!

Once we have those details, we'll look into why the promotion isn't showing up and get this sorted for you.

Thanks for your patience!
